metadata.name: Circuit Tracks
metadata.description: Standalone groovebox with two synth tracks, four sample tracks, and powerful sequencing capabilities.

tooltip.title: Master Volume
tooltip.description: Controls the overall output level for headphones and line outputs.
tooltip.tip: This is an analog control - it doesn't affect the recorded level.

tooltip.title: Oscillator
tooltip.description: Controls oscillator waveform or character. Effect varies by patch. In FX View, controls reverb/delay send for Track 1.
tooltip.tip: Hold Shift and turn to fine-tune values.

tooltip.title: Oscillator Mod
tooltip.description: Modulates the oscillator - often pulse width, FM amount, or waveshaping. In FX View, controls send for Track 2.

tooltip.title: Amp Envelope
tooltip.description: Controls the amplitude envelope shape (attack/decay/sustain/release). In FX View, controls send for Track 3.

tooltip.title: Filter Envelope
tooltip.description: Controls the filter envelope amount/depth. In FX View, controls send for Track 4.

tooltip.title: Filter Frequency
tooltip.description: Controls the filter cutoff frequency. In FX View, controls send for Track 5.

tooltip.title: Resonance
tooltip.description: Controls filter resonance/emphasis at the cutoff frequency. In FX View, controls send for Track 6.

tooltip.title: Modulation
tooltip.description: General modulation control - often LFO depth or vibrato amount. In FX View, controls send for Track 7.

tooltip.title: Effects
tooltip.description: Patch-specific effects control - often distortion or additional modulation. In FX View, controls send for Track 8.

tooltip.title: Shift
tooltip.description: Hold to access secondary functions on other buttons and knobs.
tooltip.tip: Many buttons have a secondary function when Shift is held.

tooltip.title: Octave Down
tooltip.description: Shifts the keyboard/pads down one octave.
tooltip.tip: Shift + Octave Down: Undo last action.

tooltip.title: Octave Up
tooltip.description: Shifts the keyboard/pads up one octave.
tooltip.tip: Shift + Octave Up: Redo last action.

tooltip.title: Synth Track 1
tooltip.description: Select Synth Track 1 for editing and playback.
tooltip.tip: Double-tap to enter patch browser.

tooltip.title: Synth Track 2
tooltip.description: Select Synth Track 2 for editing and playback.

tooltip.title: Sample Track 1 (Drums)
tooltip.description: Select Sample Track 1 for editing. Typically used for kick drums.

tooltip.title: Sample Track 2 (Drums)
tooltip.description: Select Sample Track 2 for editing. Typically used for snares.

tooltip.title: Sample Track 3 (Drums)
tooltip.description: Select Sample Track 3 for editing. Typically used for hi-hats.

tooltip.title: Sample Track 4 (Drums)
tooltip.description: Select Sample Track 4 for editing. Typically used for percussion.

tooltip.title: MIDI Track 1
tooltip.description: Select MIDI Track 1 for sequencing external gear. Sends MIDI notes and CC data.
tooltip.tip: Configure MIDI channel in the Setup menu.

tooltip.title: MIDI Track 2
tooltip.description: Select MIDI Track 2 for sequencing external gear. Sends MIDI notes and CC data.
tooltip.tip: Configure MIDI channel in the Setup menu.

tooltip.title: Scales
tooltip.description: Enable scale mode to constrain notes to a specific musical scale.
tooltip.tip: Choose from major, minor, and many other scales.

tooltip.title: Step Page
tooltip.description: Toggle between steps 1-16 and 17-32 in the sequencer view.

tooltip.title: Save
tooltip.description: Save the current project. Shift+Save opens the Setup menu.
tooltip.tip: Projects auto-save, but manual save ensures your work is preserved.

tooltip.title: Preset Browser
tooltip.description: Browse and select presets/patches for the currently selected track.

tooltip.title: Note View
tooltip.description: Enter Note view to play and record notes on the pad grid.
tooltip.tip: Shift+Note enters Expand mode for detailed note editing.

tooltip.title: Pattern Settings
tooltip.description: Access pattern-level settings like length and playback direction.
tooltip.tip: Shift+Pattern Settings opens Probability editing.

tooltip.title: Effects
tooltip.description: Access the effects section for delay and reverb controls.
tooltip.tip: Circuit Tracks has delay on the left side and reverb on the right.

tooltip.title: Mixer
tooltip.description: View and adjust volume levels for all tracks.
tooltip.tip: Use the pads to see and adjust track levels.

tooltip.title: Tempo
tooltip.description: Tap to set tempo or hold to view/edit the current BPM.
tooltip.tip: Hold and turn Macro 1 to fine-tune tempo.

tooltip.title: Play
tooltip.description: Start playback of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Record
tooltip.description: Enable recording mode. Notes played will be recorded to the sequencer.
tooltip.tip: Recording is quantized to the current step resolution.

tooltip.title: Pattern
tooltip.description: Access the pattern view to select and manage patterns.
tooltip.tip: Hold to chain multiple patterns for longer sequences.

tooltip.title: Velocity
tooltip.description: View and edit velocity values for sequenced notes.

tooltip.title: Gate Length
tooltip.description: View and edit gate length/duration for sequenced notes.

tooltip.title: Projects
tooltip.description: Access project management - save, load, and organize your work.
tooltip.tip: Projects contain 8 sessions, each with 8 patterns.

tooltip.title: Clear
tooltip.description: Hold and press a step to clear it, or hold and press a track button to clear the track.
tooltip.tip: Shift + Clear: Clear the entire pattern.

tooltip.title: Duplicate
tooltip.description: Copy and paste patterns, steps, or tracks.
tooltip.tip: Great for creating variations.

tooltip.title: 32-Pad Grid
tooltip.description: Multi-function pad grid for notes, steps, samples, and more.
tooltip.tip: The function changes based on which mode/view is active.

tooltip.title: Master Filter
tooltip.description: Large DJ-style filter that sweeps across the entire mix. Turn left for low-pass (bass only), right for high-pass (treble only).
tooltip.tip: Center position (12 o'clock) is neutral/bypass. Great for live performance transitions and drops.

tooltip.title: Power Button
tooltip.description: Press to turn the unit on or off. Hold for 3 seconds to force power off.

tooltip.title: USB-C Port
tooltip.description: Connect to computer for MIDI over USB, firmware updates, and Novation Components software.
tooltip.tip: Also provides power when connected.

tooltip.title: Micro SD Card Slot
tooltip.description: Insert a Micro SD card to expand sample storage and backup projects.

tooltip.title: MIDI Thru (5-pin DIN)
tooltip.description: Passes through MIDI data received at MIDI In to chain multiple devices.

tooltip.title: MIDI Out (5-pin DIN)
tooltip.description: Send MIDI to external synthesizers, drum machines, or other gear.

tooltip.title: MIDI In (5-pin DIN)
tooltip.description: Receive MIDI from external controllers, sequencers, or a DAW.

tooltip.title: Sync Port
tooltip.description: Connect to modular gear or other devices using analog clock sync.

tooltip.title: Output Right (1/4" / 6.35mm)
tooltip.description: Right channel of the stereo main output. Connect to mixer, audio interface, or powered speaker.

tooltip.title: Output Left/Mono (1/4" / 6.35mm)
tooltip.description: Left channel output. Use alone for mono output, or with Output R for stereo.
tooltip.tip: When only this output is connected, the signal is summed to mono.

tooltip.title: Headphone Output (3.5mm)
tooltip.description: Connect headphones for monitoring. Volume controlled by Master Volume knob.

tooltip.title: Input 2 (1/4" / 6.35mm)
tooltip.description: Audio input for external sources. Route through the mixer and effects.

tooltip.title: Input 1 (1/4" / 6.35mm)
tooltip.description: Audio input for external sources. Route through the mixer and effects.
